posts.text:
While we’re (rightfully) focused on Iran, there are so many other stories of corruption, criminality, and incompetence that we’re not talking about.

Remember Jeffrey Epstein? Hello?

We break down the week that was with a very special guest (and hero of mine): E. Jean Carroll. piped.video/watch?v=U7a9MnIQ…

Trump is cornered in Iran. So what will he do now? 

I'm curious to hear your thoughts. robertreich.substack.com/p/o…

Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.

Video

We are in an unnecessary war that the public doesn’t want, without a clear purpose or endgame. 

How should the American people respond? Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

We're spending $1 billion per day on war as millions of working people struggle to get by.

Meanwhile, America's ultra-rich have never been richer.

Video

Throughout history, waging war has always been part of the authoritarian playbook.

Donald Trump’s war in Iran is the latest example. Watch.

Video

Trump announced on Friday that there will be no deal with Iran “except UNCONDITIONAL SURRENDER!”

What the hell does this mean?

What will Trump demand of Iran for its “unconditional surrender?” robertreich.substack.com/p/o…

Last year, lobbying firms raked in over $5 million from clients hoping to secure a pardon from Trump.

Turns out his pay-to-pardon scheme is quite lucrative. Watch.

Video

It's not just gas prices that are surging thanks to Trump's war.

Fertilizer costs could rise too — and send food prices skyrocketing.

Feat. @wkamaubell

Video

It’s been a hard week. If you’re feeling angry, you’re not alone. I see it in your comments. I’m struck by how you are fighting back against this tyranny, nonetheless. 

You are giving me hope.

Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/s…

Over 97% of public comments submitted to the commission reviewing Trump's ballroom oppose his White House vanity project. 

So who is this monstrosity even for? 

Billionaires and corporate donors seeking to bribe Trump for political favors. Watch.

Video

The Ellisons’ new Paramount/Warner Bros mega-media monopoly would never pass muster if America still had antitrust enforcers. 

So who can stop this? State attorneys general. Here's how. ⬇️

actionnetwork.org/letters/st…

For those who have forgotten the past 40 years:

Tax cuts for the rich
...don’t trickle down

Boosting military spending
...doesn’t bring peace

Slashing regulations
...doesn’t create jobs

Folks, we’ve seen this all before.

Have you seen the commercial that brought down Kristi Noem?

It’s even more bizarre than I expected.

Feat. @wkamaubell

Video

Another forever war in the Middle East.

Kristi Noem’s Mount Rushmore sized corruption.

An abysmal jobs report.

Special guest @wkamaubell and I discuss the week that was (and more!) on a new Coffee Klatch. Join us. 

piped.video/pWzKLEiITN8

Trump’s blatant lawlessness will haunt America and the world — and civilization — for years to come. It is our sacred duty, to ourselves and future generations, to peacefully and legally put an end to it. robertreich.substack.com/p/t…

So why are we at the precipice of World War III? What is our reason for committing so many troops at such great cost and risk? What is America’s interest?

Trump isn’t saying, except to talk in vague generalities. Some thoughts... robertreich.substack.com/p/w…
E. Jean Carroll on the Epstein Files
Decoding Trump’s Brain (Ft. E. Jean Carroll)
The World's BEST Sandwich
Just How Bad is Inequality in America?
Trump's Sh*tty War
The Commercial That Brought Down Kristi Noem
In With Iran, Out With Noem ft. W. Kamau Bell | The Coffee Klatch with Robert Reich
What Trump Gains From War in Iran
Remember When Trump Opposed Wars?
Trump Parties While Bombing Iran

Shameful. 

https://www.propublica.org/article/veterans-affairs-mental-health-therapists-quit-trump

Even the conservative Wall Street Journal understands the havoc wealth inequality is wreaking on our economy and society.

It’s far past time to unrig the system. https://www.wsj.com/finance/billionaires-low-taxes-are-becoming-a-problem-for-the-economy-27a560ca

Pete Hegseth reportedly spent $24M of expiring DOD funds on lobster, ribeye steaks, and Alaskan king crab.

Now the Pentagon wants ANOTHER $500B, on top of Trump's record-setting $1T military budget.

Imagine what we could spend that money on instead.

Everything the Ellison family could own if Paramount buys Warner Bros:

Paramount+
CBS
CNN
Showtime
HBO
Warner Bros
TNT
TBS
MTV
DC Studios
Nickelodeon
Comedy Central
Cartoon Network
And more...

This is a rotten deal that the Trump regime has rubber stamped. 

State AGs must step in and block it.

Trump has shredded the Constitution. He's taken an axe to checks and balances. He's using the presidency to line his own pockets. This is why we need to make sure that on March 28 — two weeks from today— we march across America in the largest demonstration in the nation’s history. NoKings.org

What I always hear: “We can’t afford to pay our workers more than $15 an hour.”

What I never hear: “We can’t afford to pay our CEO millions of dollars a year.” 

Funny how that works.

E. Jean Carroll, one of my personal heroes, took on Trump and won.

She’s one of the bravest people I’ve met.

She shared some thoughts on Trump and Epstein’s awful friendship.

Trump’s war on Iran rages on.

Thousands are dead. Gas prices are skyrocketing. And the American people are pissed.

How much longer will this madness last?

All that and more on this week's Coffee Klatch — with special guest E. Jean Carroll.

While we’re (rightfully) focused on Iran, there are so many other stories of corruption, criminality, and incompetence that we’re not talking about.

Remember Jeffrey Epstein? Hello?

We break down the week that was with a very special guest (and hero of mine): E. Jean Carroll.

Trump is still trying to find other ways to slap tariffs on imports.

If he follows through, we'll pay an estimated $330 billion more for goods this year — over $2,500 per household. 

Remember that his first round of illegal tariffs didn't even work. 

We LOST manufacturing jobs. 

Hello?

The economy grew at an annual rate of just 0.7% at the end of 2025, down from the initially reported 1.4% estimate.

Trump is running the economy just like he ran his businesses — straight into the ground. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zbh9SW5Cgqg

The SAVE plan, which allowed student loan borrowers to pay back their loans based on their income, is dead after the Trump administration refused to defend it in court.

Now, monthly payments will spike by as much as 400%.

Trump is making the affordability crisis worse by the day.

I wanted to write to you about my new hearing aids — and the importance of feedback. 

It's becoming more clear everyday that there isn't anyone around Trump who tells him anything other than what he already wants to hear. 

This is dangerous.

How many lives will be lost? 

How many families will be destroyed?

How much suffering will be inflicted upon the world because our Tyrant-in-Chief launched us into another unwanted forever war based on his feelings?

EXCLUSIVE: Military leaders warned Hegseth not to gut the offices that limit risk to civilians. He ignored them.

The decision faces renewed attention as the Pentagon investigates a strike on an Iranian girls’ school that killed hundreds of children.
What stage of the dystopia is this?

Why hasn't Trump received  a "rally around the flag" bump in his approval rating?
I made every presidential approval chart you could ever want to explain www.gelliottmorris.com/p/i-graphed-...

"'It’s corruption,' said @kathleenclark.bsky.social Clark, a government ethics expert at Washington University School of Law in St. Louis. 'Government decision makers will feel pressure to use contract awards to enrich the president’s family.'"

@bernardcondon.bsky.social for @apnews.com
Billionaire control of the media is a danger to us all. www.nytimes.com/2026/03/13/b...
E. Jean Carroll, one of my personal heroes, took on Trump and won. She’s one of the bravest people I’ve met. She shared some thoughts on Trump and Epstein’s awful friendship.
Today I want to tell you about my favorite sandwich, where to get it, and some other very important information you might not have heard before.
We're spending $1 billion per day on war as millions of working people struggle to get by. Meanwhile, America's ultra-rich have never been richer.
It's not just gas prices that are surging thanks to Trump's war. Fertilizer costs could rise too — and send food prices skyrocketing.
Have you seen the commercial that brought down Kristi Noem? It’s even more bizarre than I expected.

Trump and Republicans are spreading lies about SNAP in order to justify cutting the vital food assistance program. Why? So they can give bigger tax breaks to the rich and continue to boost military spending. Here’s what you should know.

Billionaire tax cuts are a policy choice. Pumping record sums into the military industrial complex is a policy choice. Launching us into another forever war is a policy choice. Doing all of this, while cutting vital food assistance programs is a policy choice.
Donald Trump once opposed war and promised to remove America from foreign entanglements. This is why he broke that promise.
This is what Donald Trump used to say about war.
10 years ago, Bernie Sanders warned America of the unintended consequences that could emerge from a regime change war with Iran. Watch.
